titleZh: Goh Jin Hian 诉 Inter-Pacific Petroleum Pte Ltd
titleEn: Goh Jin Hian v Inter-Pacific Petroleum Pte Ltd
forumZh: 新加坡司法机关案例简报
holdingZh: 该案例简报强调新加坡法下董事是“守望者而非侦探”，用于对照中国董事忠实勤勉义务讨论。
holdingEn: The case brief frames directors as 'sentinels, not sleuths', useful for comparing oversight expectations with Chinese law.
